description: Ladies 200 Denier Velvet Plush Thermal Leggings. With the excellent thermal qualities, you can stay warm while the temperature outside falls. The thermal plush leggings are essential for cold autumn and winter days, providing more heat insulation than standard leggings. With their unique construction and specially developed fibres, the warm air is kept close to your skin for ultimate comfort and softness. Soft brushed inner layer traps warm air close to your skin. Elastane provides a comfortable and secure fit. Side seam free. No 'see through' areas. Fits like a second skin. Improved gusset for fit and comfort. Machine washable. Choose your height then your hip/dress size to find your perfect fit. If your measurements are at the boundary between sizes, you may find the next size up more comfortable.
